title: Track remaining coding-ritual setup (claude-rc install/verify)
description: Placeholder to verify cr- prefix after beads reinit. Real remaining work: install+verify claude-rc systemd sessions from an interactive WSL shell; verify the 4 project paths.
notes: 2026-06-25 RESOLVED bus: user D-Bus bus now working (running, /run/user/1000/bus present). Root cause was WSLg clobbering /run/user/1000 after the user session init. Durable fix: created %USERPROFILE%/.wslconfig (C:/Users/Pavan M/.wslconfig) with [wsl2] guiApplications=false (user confirmed they don't use Linux GUI apps). Takes effect after 'wsl --shutdown' + reopen. After reboot: verify systemctl --user is-system-running, then run scripts/setup-claudex-rc.sh.
close_reason: All 5 remote-control sessions verified active/running and stable (4 Claude per-project + 1 Codex daemon). Bus fixed via guiApplications=false; coding-ritual & multibaggers fixed by accepting workspace trust. Connect URLs confirmed in logs.
